query:
INSERT INTO annotations (
                    artifact_id,
                    slug,
                    metadata,
                    source,
                    context,
                    project_id,
                    ref,
                    actor_id,
                    actor_type
                ) VALUES (
                    $1,
                    $2,
                    $3,
                    $4,
                    $5,
                    $6,
                    $7,
                    $8,
                    $9
                )
                RETURNING id, created
